hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git (commit|push)"; then CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "main" || "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "master" ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct commit/push is prohibited on branch: $CURRENT_BRANCH"; exit 1; fi; fi'
bash -c 'for r in "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; do s="$r/.claude/hooks/check_agent_memory.py"; if [ -f "$s" ]; then exec python3 "$s"; fi; done'
